3304070.name: Deliria VR
3304070.description:
About This Game

Diliria VR is a psychological horror game set in a cold, foggy town. After a car crash, you wake up alone in the snow with no clear memory of what happened. The streets are empty, the buildings are abandoned and a deep rumbling sound comes from somewhere in the fog.

While exploring hotels, alleys, tunnels and other locations, you find strange clues, missing people and signs that something is very wrong with the area around the lake. A small café, a quiet police station and an old lighthouse all hold pieces of the mystery.

To escape, you need to explore, solve puzzles, restore power and open new paths. The fog keeps getting thicker and something out there seems to be watching you.

Key Features:

  • Immersive VR Horror: Feel the tension and dread as you explore the foggy, decaying town in full virtual reality. Experience every unsettling sound, shadow, and moment of isolation like never before.

  • Engaging Storyline: A deeply personal narrative that unfolds through cryptic radio broadcasts, flashbacks, and spine-chilling encounters. Face the truth of your past and the consequences of your actions.

  • Atmospheric World: The town is a character in itself. From claustrophobic alleyways to decaying hospitals, every location immerses you deeper into the mystery.

  • Psychological Horror: Diliria VR focuses on slow-burn tension, guilt, and psychological torment, rather than jump scares. The creatures you encounter represent your inner fears and the darkness you try to hide from.

  • Challenging Exploration: Solve puzzles, gather items, and find new paths as you navigate blocked roads and crumbling buildings. The town's layout changes subtly as your journey continues, adding to the feeling of unease and disorientation.

The Truth is Buried in the Fog
